info.name: Reverse Cursed Technique Feats
info.description: Reverse Cursed Technique Feats from JJK.
info.author: JJK

p.em: Prerequisite: Must have Reverse Cursed Technique

description.p: You have learned to feed your cursed techniques with reverse cursed energy instead of normal. This leads your technique to have the opposite of its normal effect. Turning debuffing into buffing and inverting damage types, resulting in a Reversal.

p.em: Prerequisite: Must have Reverse Cursed Technique

description.p: You have learned to offensively use reverse curse technique, whenever you deal damage to a Monstrosity, Undead, or Cursed Spirit with an unarmed strike or melee weapon, you can spend cursed energy to remove hit points from your healing pool adding them as radiant damage.

sheet.description: When you deal damage to a Monstrosity, Undead, or Cursed Spirit with an unarmed strike or melee weapon, you can spend CE to remove hit points from your healing pool adding them as radiant damage.

p.em: Prerequisite: Must have Reverse Cursed Technique

description.p: You have reached new heights with this new type of energy, becoming an unheard prodigy. You can cause a creature you touch to gain the benefits of reverse cursed technique instead of you and can use reverse cursed technique once per turn as a free action.

sheet.description: You can cause a creature you touch to gain the benefits of reverse cursed technique instead of you and can use reverse cursed technique once per turn as a free action.
